Chen Jun йҷідҝҠ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Jun (йҷідҝҠ). General of Sima Zhao. Participated in Sima ZhaoвҖҷs campaign against Zhuge Dan. Chen Jun is a fictional character. Chen Jun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
